author: Nguyễn Văn Duy
description: Structured audit, error incident, traceback, and operational logging for Red-DiscordBot with credential redaction and configurable Discord destinations.
install_msg: Load the cog, then run `[p]botops set audit #bot-audit`, `[p]botops set errors #bot-errors`, and `[p]botops set logs #bot-logs`. Review channel privacy before enabling incident logging.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild configuration and Discord channel IDs for audit, error, and operational logging. It may persist redacted incident and traceback records in the cog data path for administrative troubleshooting.
